name: Claim denied after machine jammed on me at work, now what?
description: Appeal within 20 days, add evidence, request hearing.

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after machine jammed on me at work, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days, add evidence, request hearing.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice.** Gather more evidence like new medicals or witnesses[1][4]. Hearings resolve disputes. Many denials overturned. Don't sign anything waiving rights. Get attorney experienced in appeals.
